project.name: School Media Processing
project.manager_summary: A classroom recording becomes timestamped text, a searchable lesson, and a teacher-reviewable page.

domains.label: Recording intake
domains.purpose: Accept supported classroom media and reject unusable input early.

domains.label: Lesson understanding
domains.purpose: Turn media into timestamped, searchable lesson information.

manager.title: Check the selected recording
manager.purpose: Stop unsupported files before expensive work starts.
manager.operation: Check the extension and mark supported media as accepted.
manager.next_action: Confirm the selected file is MP3, MP4, or WAV.
manager.failure_impact: No transcript or lesson page can be created.

risks: An incorrect allowlist can reject a valid lesson or accept an unusable file.
nodes.validation: Run supported-extension and unsupported-extension fixture cases.

manager.title: Turn the recording into timestamped text
manager.purpose: Make spoken lesson content readable and traceable by time.
manager.operation: Require accepted media and create ordered second-and-text rows.
manager.next_action: Check that every row has a time and readable text.
manager.failure_impact: The lesson cannot be searched or organized.

risks: Missing timestamps make source review difficult.
nodes.validation: Run the accepted-media fixture and assert second and text fields.

manager.title: Organize text as a searchable lesson
manager.purpose: Keep the lesson title and timestamped segments together.
manager.operation: Reject empty transcripts and create one lesson record.
manager.next_action: Confirm the title and at least one segment are present.
manager.failure_impact: The lesson cannot be found or published.

risks: An empty lesson record looks complete but contains no useful content.
nodes.validation: Run non-empty and empty transcript fixture cases.

manager.title: Create the teacher review page
manager.purpose: Give the teacher a simple page to inspect.
manager.operation: Escape the lesson title and render a static article.
manager.next_action: Open the generated page and compare its title with the lesson.
manager.failure_impact: The teacher has no reviewable output.

risks: Unescaped titles can break or inject page markup.
nodes.validation: Render a title containing markup and confirm it is escaped.

data_objects.description: The classroom recording selected by the caller.
data_objects.validation: The value must end in mp3, mp4, or wav.

data_objects.description: A short record proving the selected recording passed intake.
Ordered lesson text with a source time for every row.
data_objects.validation: Every row must contain second and text.
data_objects.missing_impact: No searchable lesson can be created.

data_objects.description: The lesson title and timestamped segments kept together.
data_objects.validation: The record must have a title and at least one segment.

data_objects.description: A static article fragment containing the escaped lesson title.
data_objects.validation: The title must be escaped before rendering.
data_objects.missing_impact: The teacher has no review page.

edges.label: Accepted media
edges.transform: The accepted record unlocks transcript work.

edges.label: Timestamped transcript
edges.transform: Timestamped rows become the body of a lesson.

edges.label: Searchable lesson
edges.transform: The complete lesson record becomes a review page.
